setupLocation("place2", "suggestions2", "lat2", "lon2"); document.getElementById("mainForm").addEventListener("submit", (e) => { let valid = true; if (!document.getElementById("lat1").value || !document.getElementById("lat2").value) { valid = false; const timeStr = now.toTimeString().split(' ')[0].substring(0, 5); document.getElementById('dob1').value = dateStr; document.getElementById('tob1').value = timeStr; document.getElementById('dob2').value = dateStr; document.getElementById('tob2').value = timeStr; function reverseGeocode(lat, lon, callback) { const url = `https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=json&lat=${lat}&lon=${lon}&zoom=10&addressdetails=1`; fetch(url, { headers: { 'Accept-Language': 'en' } }) .then(r => r.json()) .then(data => { const a = data.address || {}; const city = a.city || a.town || a.village || a.county || ''; const state = a.state || ''; el.className = type || ''; } function fillCurrentDateTime() { const now = new Date(); const yyyy = now.getFullYear(); const mm = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const dd = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'); const hh = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0'); const mi = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0'); const dobEl = document.getElementById('inp-dob'); const tobEl = document.getElementById('inp-tob'); if (dobEl) dobEl.value = `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd}`; if (tobEl) tobEl.value = `${hh}:${mi}`; } function reverseGeocode(lat, lon, callback) { // Use OpenStreetMap Nominatim (free, no key required) const url = `https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=json&lat=${lat}&lon=${lon}&zoom=10&addressdetails=1`; document.getElementById('inp-lon').value = lon; fillCurrentDateTime(); setGeoStatus('✅ స్థానం గుర్తించబడింది. లోడ్ అవుతోంది...', 'success'); reverseGeocode(lat, lon, function(placeName) { document.getElementById('inp-place').value = placeName; else if (err.code === 2) msg = 'స్థాన సమాచారం అందుబాటులో లేదు.'; else if (err.code === 3) msg = 'స్థానం తెలుసుకోవడానికి సమయం అయిపోయింది.'; setGeoStatus(msg, 'error'); }, { timeout: 12000, maximumAge: 60000, enableHighAccuracy: false } ); // Theme Management function setTheme(themeName) { if (themeName === 'default') { document.documentElement.removeAttribute('data-theme'); } else { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', themeName); } localStorage.setItem('preferred-theme', themeName); // Update UI buttons document.querySelectorAll('.theme-btn').forEach(btn => { btn.classList.remove('active'); if (btn.getAttribute('data-theme-btn') === themeName) { btn.classList.add('active'); } }); } // Load saved theme state into buttons immediately const savedThemeGlobal = localStorage.getItem('preferred-theme') || 'light'; document.querySelectorAll('.theme-btn').forEach(btn => { if (btn.getAttribute('data-theme-btn') === savedThemeGlobal) { btn.classList.add('active'); } else { btn.classList.remove('active'); } }); document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () { // Add animation to boxes on page load const boxes = document.querySelectorAll('.box'); boxes.forEach((box, index) => { box.style.animationDelay = `${index * 0.1}s`; box.style.animation = 'fadeIn 0.5s ease-out'; }); // Add hover effect to planets const planets = document.querySelectorAll('.hand'); planets.forEach(planet => { planet.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () { this.style.transform = 'scale(1.05)'; }); planet.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () { this.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; }); }); // Add CSS for animations const style = document.createElement('style'); style.textContent = ` @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .nav-btn-home i, .float-btn i[class*="home"] { animation: nav-rainbow 3s linear infinite !important; } @keyframes nav-rainbow { 0% { color: #ff4444; text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,68,68,0.6); } 20% { color: #ff9900; text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,153,0,0.6); } 40% { color: #ffff00; text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,255,0,0.6); } 60% { color: #44ff44; text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(68,255,68,0.6); } 80% { color: #4488ff; text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(68,136,255,0.6); } 100% { color: #ff4444; text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,68,68,0.6); } } .box { animation-fill-mode: both; } `; document.head.appendChild(style); if (loading) loading.style.display = 'block'; let lat = '{{ session.get("birth_info", {}).get("lat", "17.3850") }}'; let lon = '{{ session.get("birth_info", {}).get("lon", "78.4867") }}'; let timezone = '{{ session.get("birth_info", {}).get("timezone_str", "Asia/Kolkata") }}'; let place = '{{ session.get("birth_info", {}).get("place", "Hyderabad") }}'; if (navigator.geolocation) { navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition( function(position) { lat = position.coords.latitude; lon = position.coords.longitude; sendTransitRequest(lat, lon, timezone, place); }, function(error) { console.log('Geolocation error or denied, using birth location.', error); sendTransitRequest(lat, lon, timezone, place); const globalOverlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay'); if (globalOverlay) globalOverlay.style.display = 'none'; container.innerHTML = html; container.classList.add('loaded'); document.body.classList.add('transit-loaded'); // Show the hide/show toggle button const toggleBar = document.getElementById('transit-toggle-bar'); if (toggleBar) toggleBar.style.display = 'block'; container.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); }) .catch(error => { console.error('Error fetching transit chart:', error); loading.style.display = 'none'; const globalOverlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay'); if (globalOverlay) globalOverlay.style.display = 'none'; if (btn) btn.style.display = 'inline-flex'; alert('గ్రహ స్థితిని తీసుకురావడంలో లోపం ఏర్పడింది.'); }); } } // ===== PRINT THEME RESET (most reliable cross-browser approach) ===== // Temporarily remove data-theme so the default light CSS applies during print window.onbeforeprint = function () { // 1. Make sure loading overlay is hidden const overlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay'); if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none'; }; window.onafterprint = function() { // Restore original theme from localStorage preferred theme const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('preferred-theme') || 'default'; setTheme(savedTheme); // Restore body styles document.body.style.background = ''; document.body.style.color = ''; // Restore box styles document.querySelectorAll('.box').forEach(box => { box.style.boxShadow = ''; box.style.transform = ''; box.style.background = ''; box.style.color = ''; }); // Restore hand styles document.querySelectorAll('.hand').forEach(hand => { hand.style.border = ''; }); // Clean up print mode attribute document.body.removeAttribute('data-print-mode'); document.getElementById('tob').value = `${currentHour}:${currentMinute}`; // Auto-fill Location based on IP function autoFillLocation() { fetch('https://ipapi.co/json/') .then(response => response.json()) .then(data => { // Only fill if empty to avoid overwriting user input if (data && data.city && !placeInput.value) { placeInput.value = `${data.city}, ${data.region}, ${data.country_name}`; latInput.value = data.latitude; lonInput.value = data.longitude; } }) .catch(error => console.log('Auto-location failed:', error)); } // Auto-fill precise device location on load silently, falling back to IP if needed function initDefaultLocation() { if (!navigator.geolocation) { autoFillLocation(); return; } navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition( async (position) => { const lat = position.coords.latitude; const lon = position.coords.longitude; try { const response = await fetch( `https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=json&lat=${lat}&lon=${lon}&zoom=10&addressdetails=1` ); const data = await response.json(); if (data.display_name && !placeInput.value) { placeInput.value = data.display_name; latInput.value = lat; lonInput.value = lon; } } catch (error) { console.error("Silent geolocation reverse geocoding failed, trying IP:", error); autoFillLocation(); } }, (error) => { console.log("Silent geolocation failed or denied, trying IP:", error); autoFillLocation(); }, { enableHighAccuracy: false, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 600000 } ); } // Initialize document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () { const formGroups = document.querySelectorAll('.form-group'); formGroups.forEach((group, index) => { group.style.animationDelay = `${index * 0.1}s`; }); // Call precise auto-location on load initDefaultLocation(); }); // Clear validation errors on input document.querySelectorAll('input').forEach(input => { input.addEventListener('input', function () { this.style.borderColor = "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)"; this.style.animation = ""; const errorMsg = this.parentNode.querySelector('.error-message'); if (errorMsg) { errorMsg.style.display = 'none'; } }); }); // Navigation functions function goToBirthChart() { window.location.href = '/go-to-birth-chart';
